summary: The diff adds frontend/public/standalone.html which implements REQ-1. The file includes the correct title, Open Graph meta tags, Tailwind CDN, violet color palette, and appears to contain React logic. However, the file content is truncated so full verification of all acceptance criteria is limited. Based on visible evidence, most requirements appear addressed, but some ACs cannot be fully confirmed due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: The og:image meta tag references a local asset path (/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png) rather than a CDN link or base64 data URI, and the favicon also references a local asset path (/assets/generated/memu-logo.dim_256x256.png). These would not resolve in a truly self-contained standalone file opened without a local server.
missing_requirements.reason: The constraint states all assets must be loaded via CDN links or inlined as base64 data URIs. Local-path asset references break self-containment.
